title: Igniting Student Potential: CLL Symposium Unites Researchers, Industry Leaders, and Educators Over AI's Capacity for Self-Discovery and Empowered Learning
snippet: Errol Arkilic, Chief Innovation Officer for UC Irvine, kicked off the symposium, describing the broader context of UC Irvine's place in research and innovation. The CLL hosted its spring symposium, AI for Learner Agency and Self-discovery: Insights and Inspiration from Research and Impact Partnerships.
match_reason: websearch (talk) — Arkilic is named as opening speaker at UC Irvine's Connected Learning Lab AI symposium on learner agency and self-discovery.
